expectations.text: States (statement -> tail-recursion) #9 is NOT available for this tree recursion (no single tail call)
expectations.evidence: LLM judge: "flatten isn't naturally tail-recursive -- you recurse into a child and then still have to process its siblings, so there's real work after the call." -- conveys the no-tail-form structure (work after the recursive call = not in tail position); the TCO remark is only an additional 'anyway'.

expectations.text: Recommends an explicit-stack (if -> while) iteration or a generator-as-state-machine
